name: Wandering Merchant
description: A cheerful merchant with exotic wares.
greeting: Ah, a traveler! Care to see my wares?

choices.text: Buy a health potion (50g, heal 20 HP)

name: Mysterious Stranger
description: A hooded figure watches you silently.
greeting: I sense great potential in you... or great folly.

choices.text: Accept their blessing (lose 10 HP, gain rare card)

name: Old Hermit
description: An elderly hermit tends to a small fire.
greeting: Rest your weary bones, traveler. The road ahead is long.

choices.text: Ask about the path ahead (remove a card)

name: Fortune Teller
description: A mystic gazes into a crystal ball.
greeting: Your fate is clouded... but I can help clarify it.

choices.text: Pay for a reading (50g, upgrade a random card)
Steal the crystal ball (50% chance: gain relic or lose 15 HP)

name: Traveling Blacksmith
description: A burly smith hammers away at an anvil.
greeting: Need your gear upgraded? I'm the best there is!

choices.text: Trade gold for max HP (50g for +5 max HP)

name: Wounded Knight
description: A knight leans against the wall, armor scorched and dented.
greeting: Turn back... A dragon guards the path ahead. I barely escaped with my life.

name: Grave Keeper
description: An old man tends to graves, muttering prayers.
greeting: The Lich King stirs... The dead grow restless. You feel it too, don't you?
